calendar.matters:
PETITION TO ESTABLISH FACT OF BIRTH
Off Calendar Jan-15-2013 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: William Balin for Charles Allen.

The Court stated that it cannot issue an Order Establishing Fact of Birth when a Birth Certificate has been issued and informed Counsel that they will have to file a Petition for Change of Name in the Civil department. The Petition to Establish Fact of Birth is off calendar.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Benton.

PETITION TO ESTABLISH FACT OF BIRTH
Off Calendar Nov-06-2012 Continued To Jan-15-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: William Balin for and with Charles Allen.

Mr. Bailin explained that a family member obtained a birth certificate from Louisiana after the petition was signed, that the Father's last name was mispelled, that the Parish name was incorrect and that there is difference in the names. The Court explained that it could not issue an Order Establishing Fact of Birth when a birth certificate has been issued and suggested the Parties go to DMV with the certified copy of the birth certificate to see if they will issue an identification card. A copy of the birth certificate was provided to the Court. The Petition to Establish Fact of Birth was continued to January 15, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.
